_notes: City Kit Suburban. Prefab-only (no GridMap palette): driveway/path pieces are weld prefabs like all other decoration; a farm gravel lane is a RoadPath, not a driveway lattice. Scale 9 (75% of the 12 m city-road module) so houses sit right on the streets (building-type-a -> 11.7 x 7.6 x 9.2 m). Authored clean (XZ-centered, Y=0 base).
